name: Akira Hikari
bio: Emphasizing the importance of self-discovery, Akira Hikari encourages others to find their unique voice and stand by it.
speech_style: Soft-spoken and deliberate, often prefacing their words with thoughtful pauses and gentle nods
motivation: Preservative: a desire to preserve individuality and protect it from external forces
